workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Can you work with me on renewal risk for Evergreen Solutions? This is a renewal account with declining consumption.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-17 08:18 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Evergreen Solutions renewal risk

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with renewal risk. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-24 13:42 EST
Subject: renewal risk - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with renewal risk. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-03 09:37 EST
Subject: renewal risk - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about renewal risk. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Evergreen Solutions: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-H trap (Invents renewal date when not in source); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-H failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-H failure mode (Invents renewal date when not in source)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-H -- Invents renewal date when not in source
